name: NBHD Routing Context
description: Injects the tenant's workspace catalogue into the system prompt so the agent can self-correct routing via nbhd_workspace_switch, and rejects degenerate model output before it reaches the user.

apiBaseUrl.description: Override NBHD API base URL. Defaults to NBHD_API_BASE_URL env var.

tenantId.description: Override tenant ID. Defaults to NBHD_TENANT_ID env var.

internalApiKey.description: Override internal API key. Defaults to NBHD_INTERNAL_API_KEY env var.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for workspace list fetch.

cacheTtlMs.description: How long to cache the workspace list. Set 0 to disable.
